eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Woodward, OK; at 03:46 PM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 05:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 1544  a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control near Woodward  spreading rapidly northeast. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety  EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY to the south of the city. Those between Oklahoma Avenue and Hanks Trail and east of 22nd should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings.
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
